programme.title: The Killer Speaks
programme.desc: Levi King kills two Missouri residents in 2005, then travels to the Texas Panhandle to continue his murderous ways.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Killer Speaks
programme.desc: An acquaintance of Carolina Panthers wide receiver Rae Carruth is hired to murder the football player's pregnant girlfriend in November 1999.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: I Survived a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A fun night with her boyfriend turned into a nightmare for Holly Dunn, a junior at the University of Kentucky in 1997; somehow, Holly managed to escape her attacker by following railway tracks to a nearby house.

programme.title: I Survived a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In September 1975, 14-year-old David McVicker is abducted while hitchhiking home from a friend's house in Garden Grove, Calif.; his assailant, William Bonin, has an appetite for assaulting young men and boys.

programme.title: I Survived a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In April of 2016, 16-year-old Madison Nygard walks home from a party in rural Muskegon County, Mich., and takes a ride with a passing stranger.

programme.title: I Survived a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Josephina Rivera's life comes to a halt when the 25-year-old is kidnapped by 43-year-old Gary Heidnik; over the next four months, Josephina lives shackled in a basement while her captor abducts four more women to hold hostage in his house of horrors.

programme.title: I Survived a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Josephina Rivera's life comes to a halt when the 25-year-old is kidnapped by 43-year-old Gary Heidnik; over the next four months, Josephina lives shackled in a basement while her captor abducts four more women to hold hostage in his house of horrors.

programme.title: I Survived a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Morgan Rowan describes how she was brutally attacked in 1968 by Rodney Alcala during a party at his Hollywood home; three weeks later, Alcala would abduct and attack 8-year-old Tali Shapiro, who describes her chilling assault in her own words.

programme.title: The Torso Killer Confessions
programme.desc: Bergen County, N.J., Chief of Detectives Robert Anzilotti elicited murder confessions from a vicious but relatively unknown serial killer, Richard Cottingham, nicknamed the Torso Killer; Anzilotti's mission to tie Cottingham to additional murders.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Torso Killer Confessions
programme.desc: Bergen County, N.J., Chief of Detectives Robert Anzilotti continues his mission to tie Cottingham to additional murders and to get him to confess to more cold-case homicides.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Bergen County, N.J., Chief of Detectives Robert Anzilotti elicited murder confessions from a vicious but relatively unknown serial killer, Richard Cottingham, nicknamed the Torso Killer; Anzilotti's mission to tie Cottingham to additional murders.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Wounded Warrior Project: No Warrior is Left Behind
programme.desc: Wounded Warrior Project is changing the way our nation cares for veterans and helping them thrive for a lifetime. Join Trace Adkins and Dan Nevins to learn about the journeys of four injured veterans and how no warrior is left behind.

programme.title: Gangsters: America's Most Evil
programme.sub-title: Los Muchachos: Augusto Falcon and Salvador Magluta
programme.desc: A pair of powerboat racers who allegedly moved more illegal narcotics than just about anyone in the history of the U.S. War on Drugs.

programme.title: Gangsters: America's Most Evil
programme.sub-title: The Baron of Brotherhood: Barry Mills
programme.desc: Barry Mills found his calling as the leader of the white supremacist prison gang the Aryan Brotherhood.

programme.title: Gangsters: America's Most Evil
programme.sub-title: The Cutt Boyz: Terrance Benjamin & Derrick Washington
programme.desc: The Cutt Boyz use violence to control the drug trade within the B.W. Cooper Housing Complex in New Orleans.

programme.title: Gangsters: America's Most Evil
programme.sub-title: Sex, Money, Murder, Inc.: "Pistol Pete" Rollack
programme.desc: Pistol Pete and his underlings incorporated the gang Sex, Money, Murder in an effort to launder drug money and expanded their operations outside New York.

programme.title: Mobsters
programme.desc: Irish mobster Danny Greene clashed with the Cleveland mafia; a bombing war that would eventually destroy them both.

programme.title: Mobsters
programme.desc: Frank Calabrese Jr., son of mobster Frank Calabrese, flipped against his father, and nearly brought down the vaunted Chicago Outfit.

programme.title: Mobsters
programme.desc: Carmine Persico stands as one of most enduring Godfathers in mafia history.

programme.title: Mobsters
programme.desc: Tommy Lucchese, one of the most successful and notorious members of the Italian-American Mafia, pioneered and perfected labor rackets in New York City's kosher chicken industry, the garment district and the world of professional boxing.

programme.desc: John Gotti starts out as the leader of a group of young thugs in his South Bronx neighborhood and works his way up to a leadership position in the Gambino crime family.
